calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.,
No appearance by defaulted defendants EVOLVE BUILDINGS, Inc. AKA EVOLVE BUILDING INC FDBA PERFORMANCE ENVELOPE AND MECHANICAL SYSTEMS, INC. ADBA PEM SYSTEMS ADBA PEM SYSTEMS INC.; PERFORMANCE ENVELOPE AND MECHANICAL SYSTEMS, INC. DBA PEM SYSTEMS ADBA PEM SYSTEMS INC.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

Witness, Thomas Nute, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $37,319.64
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,028.48
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $739.65
Total Judgment in the amount of $42,087.77

Judgment signed in open court.
